abilities.name: Drain Vitality
abilities.flavor: This cursed spell saps a foe’s strength, leaving them weak and vulnerable.
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Reknit Construct
abilities.flavor: This Mortisan has the power to remake and renew that which has been destroyed.
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit and that is not in combat to be the target.
abilities.effect: Heal (D3) the target. If the target unit is not damaged, you can instead return a number of slain models to it that have a combined Health characteristic of D3 or less. KEYWORDS OSSIARCH COMMAND

abilities.name: Deathrider Wedge
abilities.flavor: Kavalos Deathriders can charge in a deadly arrowhead formation that bursts through the enemy’s defences.
abilities.effect: The following effects apply this phase: Models in this unit can pass across enemy INFANTRY models as if this unit had FLY . After this unit has charged , you can pick an enemy unit that it passed across and roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit. KEYWORDS OSSIARCH COMMAND

abilities.name: Nadirite Assault
abilities.flavor: The weapons of the Ossiarch legions can siphon souls with a single cut, stealing the foe’s life force.
abilities.effect: Until the end of the phase, this unit’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) . KEYWORDS OSSIARCH COMMAND

abilities.name: Deathrider Wedge
abilities.flavor: Kavalos Deathriders can charge in a deadly arrowhead formation that bursts through the enemy’s defences.
abilities.effect: The following effects apply this phase: Models in this unit can pass across enemy INFANTRY models as if this unit had FLY . After this unit has charged , you can pick an enemy unit that it passed across and roll a dice. On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit. KEYWORDS OSSIARCH COMMAND

abilities.name: Nadirite Assault
abilities.flavor: The weapons of the Ossiarch legions can siphon souls with a single cut, stealing the foe’s life force.
abilities.effect: Until the end of the phase, this unit’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) . KEYWORDS OSSIARCH COMMAND

abilities.name: Bone Harvest
abilities.flavor: As a Gothizzar Harvester fights, it works to amass a grisly stockpile of bones.
abilities.effect: Each time an enemy model in combat with this unit is slain, this unit gains 1 bone-tithe point . It can never have more than 6 bone-tithe points .

abilities.name: Repair Construct
abilities.flavor: The Harvester uses a portion of its morbid crop to restore the forms of fellow Ossiarchs.
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly Mortek Guard unit within 6" of this unit to be the target. Then, roll a dice for each bone-tithe point this unit has.
abilities.effect: For each 4+, you can return 1 slain model to the target unit. Then, reset this unit’s bone-tithe points to 0.
